name: A CMV-vector TERT lifespan paper was retracted
summary: A retraction notice removes a prominent claimed CMV-TERT mouse lifespan signal from the active evidence base.
statement: The 2022 PNAS paper reporting intranasal and injectable CMV-vector TERT and follistatin life extension in mice is marked as retracted by a 2025 PNAS retraction notice.
population_or_model: Publication record for the retracted CMV-TERT mouse gene-therapy paper
quantitative_note: The retraction notice refers to PMID 35537048, which had claimed mouse median lifespan extension from MCMV-TERT.
caveats: The retraction notice does not itself test telomerase restoration.
This finding should be used only to prevent reliance on the retracted paper as positive evidence.
